column1: # mapping_set_description: DPV `legal/eu/dga` extension <-> ISO/IEC 27701:2019 (PIMS) alignment for the EU Data Governance Act. LLM-seeded candidate alignments (Claude Opus 4.7) - DGA roles (data holder / user / cooperative / intermediation service / altruism organisation), registers, and approval / authority concepts map mostly to ISO 27701 stakeholder and processing-record clauses. Each row classifies as `semapv:LLMBasedMatching` and requires human review before promotion to `semapv:LLMBasedMatching`.
